name: Labour Force Participation Rate
description: LFPR measures the share of the working-age population that is either employed or actively looking for work. A rising LFPR, especially among women, is one of the more structural, slow-moving signals of how India's labour market is changing.
releaseSchedule: Released quarterly alongside the unemployment rate.

chart.title: More Indians are entering the workforce
chart.subtitle: Labour force participation rate (15+), %, quarterly
